title: BABE Baseline — RoBERTa Fine-tune Reproduction
excerpt: Reproducing sentence-level media bias classification on BABE. A clean RoBERTa-base fine-tune that beats published baselines at 0.857 macro-F1.

title: MBIB Quality Observatory
excerpt: An audit of the Media Bias Identification Benchmark — label noise probes, near-duplicate detection, and LLM review across 8 tasks.

title: Rec-Dating: Role-Based Bipartite Network
excerpt: Studying the rec-dating dataset as a role-based bipartite network — popularity, prestige, and feature alignment with HITS.
